titleStmt.title: SII 34.146: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 146. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south and east walls of the central shrine in the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya, Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Mithuna, badi 10, Rēvatī, Friday = A.D. 1544, June 13, Friday.

This records a gift of land in Kuḻittaṇḍalai-sīrmai alias Karuṅgilāppaḷḷi in Mīkōḍu-nāḍu, of Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu, by Timmappa-Nāyaka, the executive agent (kāriyattukku kartar) of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Chinna-Timmayadēva-Mahārāja, for the morning offerings in the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiya-Tambirāṉār. A string of titles and the genealogy of the donor are given in the beginning. He belonged to Chembala gōtra. son of Siṅgama-nāyakkar and grandson of Cherukku Koṇḍama-nāyakkar of Toṇḍai-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Accutarāya sadāśiva deva mahārāyaṟ
kuccellā niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 6 10 6 Itaṉ mēl ce
llāniṉṟa kuṟōtisamvaṟcarattu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu kṛṣṇa [pakṣa]
rattu [ deca] miyum rēvati nakṣattiramum peṟṟa cukkira vārattu
nāḷ teṉkarai Irācakempīra vaḷanāṭṭukku
kara nāṭṭu nayinār tirumā
ṉāṟkku śrīmanmahāmaṇṭalēcura Irāma Irāca ciṉṉattimma
tēvamakārācāviṉ kāriyattu kku rāṉa toṇṭaimaṇ
ṭalam tummala tēva vacava caṅkara va kara kaṇṭakaṭa
kak kuṟaittāṟkku mallukalakuṇṭaka vimacattā
ṅka karaṇaceṅkuḷi maṉṉarakaṇṭa laṅkara
kaṇṭa Uṇṭavīṭṭu timma kuṭamarāvu cempa
la kōttiramāṉa cerukku koṇṭama nāyakkar puttiranāna
ciṅkamanāyakkar puttiraṉ timmappa nāyakkar kuṭutta taṉmacā
taṉappaṭṭaiyam teṉkarai rācakempīra vaḷanāṭṭu mīkō
ṭṭu nāṭṭuk kuḻittaṇṭalaic cīrmai Āṉa karuṅkilāppaḷḷi
nañcai nilattil ceṅkaḻinīrōṭai vaṭṭam nilam 1 vēli Inta nilam
vēliyum tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiya tampirāṉāṟkku kālacantikku
tūṇipatakku Ammutupaṭi naivēttiyam paṇṇi tirumañcaṉanā
yamāṟkku māyēcura pūcaikku kuṭuttapaṭiyālē cantiṟātitta varaiyum
Aṉupavittu varakkaṭavarākavum Inta taṉmattukku Akita
m paṇṇiṉavaṉ keṅkaikkaraiyilē kārāmpacuk ko
ṉṟa pāpattilē
pōkak kaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 34.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
